articles.title: North America’s largest commuter rail system shuts for strike
articles.description:
The railroad, which serves New York City and its eastern suburbs, ceased operations just after midnight after five unions representing about half its workforce walked off the job.

The post North America’s largest commuter rail system shuts for strike appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: North America's largest commuter rail system halted operations due to a strike.
Five unions representing about half of the workforce initiated the strike at midnight.
Boston residents may face increased traffic and delays as alternative transportation options become crowded.

articles.title: One driver dead in NH collision between pickup truck and school bus
articles.description:
Authorities said 13 students were aboard the bus at the time of the fatal Marlborough, New Hampshire, crash, though none were seriously injured.

The post One driver dead in NH collision between pickup truck and school bus appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: One driver died in a collision between a pickup truck and a school bus in Marlborough, NH.
Thirteen students were on the bus; none sustained serious injuries during the incident.
The crash raises concerns about school transportation safety for Boston area families.
